ModDescription.blacklist: No blacklisted members. The community is healthy!
ModDescription.Description:
Survivalcraft: Wilderness Tech (HYKJ) was founded in October 2023, rebuilt four times to reach its current form.

The mod stays true to the theme of primitive evolution. You play as a castaway, exiled to a deserted island by pirates, starting from scratch as a caveman.

Rich materials, gear, weapons, and tools await—plus sprinting and thirst mechanics. Survive this wilderness!

ModVersion.0.0.5Description:
Wilderness Tech v0.0.5 Update
1.Mod notice button is back!
2.Added test items
3.Updated to API 1.8.1.2
4.Removed redundant files, reduced size (3MB→1MB)
5.Modified vanilla recipes
6.Fixed mod button not responding
7.Fixed stat button position bug
8.Fixed missing rounded corners in UI
9.Fixed clay firing texture missing
10.Added credits, description, and download links
11.From v0.0.5 onward, updates won't be categorized as Add/Fix

Neolithic era equipment.

FlintBlock:0.Description: An uneven, sharp stone flake. Needs processing before use.

WAAAH! Glory days!

coal_powderBlock:0.Description: Common resource from processing coal ore. Burns more efficiently.

AHH!! Don't blow away~

crucibleBlock:0.Description: Weird dry goods... Where's my tongs?!

crucible1Block:0.Description:
Ooh~ Interesting! Careful, it's hot.
Used for casting ingots.

crucible2Block:0.Description:
Ooh~ Interesting! Careful, it's hot.
Used for casting ingots.

silverChunkBlock:0.Description: Usually found deep in caves. Looks similar to other ores—don't miss it!

goldChunkBlock:0.Description: Shimmering gold ore, glowing in the distance!

CopperAxe1Block:0.Description: Cast from molten copper using a mold. Combine with sticks and rope to make a copper axe.

CopperPickaxe1Block:0.Description: Cast from molten copper using a mold. Combine with sticks and rope to make a copper pickaxe.

silver_nuggetBlock:0.Description: A solid block of pure silver. Very heavy and durable. Extremely resistant to mining and explosions. Crafted from multiple silver ingots.

gold_nuggetBlock:0.Description: A solid block of pure gold, soft in texture. Very heavy but not very durable. Poor mining and explosion resistance. Crafted from multiple gold ingots.

plant_fiberBlock:0.Description: Soft material from plants. Used for rope or cloth.

hemp_ropeBlock:0.Description: Stronger than grass rope. For advanced tool crafting?

barkBlock:0.Description:
Processing material... or just trash.

Can be used as fuel if desperate.

straw_ropeBlock:0.Description:
Basic binding material twisted from plant fibers.

Should be useful for crafting.

Wood1Block:0.Description:
Common and easy to obtain. Soft texture.
Good for basic tools and simple structures.

drill_wood_make_fireBlock:0.Description:
Ancient fire-making technique.

When you have no other options, this might be your best bet.

branchesBlock:0.Description:
Common from breaking leaves.

Can be processed into sticks.

flint_hammerBlock:0.Description:
A striking tool made from sharp stone flakes. Used to process other stone tools, shape stone edges, or repair tools.

Made from sharp stone flakes, designed to concentrate force for effective striking and shaping.

Represents ancient understanding of material properties and tool-making skills.

Still in the Paleolithic era.

Flint_processing_tableBlock:0.Description:
Early-game processing station for basic materials like wood.

Uses flint's hardness to cut and shape wood into sticks, planks, or simple wooden tools.

Very practical early on for preparing basic materials.

working_pilesBlock:0.Description:
Basic crafting station for simple items like sticks, stone axes, and stone picks.

Essential early-game workbench for making tools and weapons.

adhesiveBlock:0.Description: Sticky slime that bonds items quickly. Works on various materials.

Leather_clothBlock:0.Description: Soft yet tough material made from leather. Combines durability with flexibility. Basic material for gear and items.

Flint_knifeBlock:0.Description: High damage weapon made from sharp stone flakes. Low durability.

leather_knifeBlock:0.Description:
High damage weapon made from sharp stone flakes. Low durability.

Leather grip improves handling and accuracy.

big_boneBlock:0.Description: Sturdy bone from animals. Processed into more durable tools.

boneBlock:0.Description: Sturdy bone from animals. Processed into more durable tools.

cokeBlock:0.Description: Wood burned into carbon. Usable as fuel, but weaker than coal.

wasteBlock:0.Description: Unnecessary parts from crafting. Maybe recyclable?

templateBlock:0.Description: Basic mold made from clay and dirt. Can be pressed into various shapes.

pick_moldBlock:0.Description: Press to shape into tool molds.

ingot_moldBlock:0.Description: Press to shape into ingot molds.

slab_moldBlock:0.Description: Press to shape into plate molds.

axe_moldBlock:0.Description: Press to shape into tool molds.

bone_pickBlock:0.Description: Tool crafted from polished bone. Efficiency comparable to Copper Age.

bone_MacheteBlock:0.Description: Tool crafted from polished bone. Efficiency comparable to Copper Age.

bone_ShovelBlock:0.Description: Tool crafted from polished bone. Efficiency comparable to Copper Age.

bone_AxeBlock:0.Description: Tool crafted from polished bone. Efficiency comparable to Copper Age.

bone_SpearBlock:0.Description: Tool crafted from polished bone. Efficiency comparable to Copper Age.

bone_hammerBlock:0.Description: Tool crafted from polished bone. Efficiency comparable to Copper Age.

sideroblastsBlock:0.Description: Small iron fragments. Smelt to combine into blocks.

copper_particlesBlock:0.Description: Small copper fragments. Smelt to combine into blocks.

malletBlock:0.Description: Heavy hammer. High damage but expensive to craft.

iron_hammerBlock:0.Description: Heavy hammer. High damage but expensive to craft.

emBlock:0.Description: The skull of a rhino. Supreme honor—congrats on defeating the strongest vanilla creature!

CupBlock:0.Description: A cup carved from wood planks. Can hold water?

Wood bundled with rope. Burns longer than coal.

Sadly doesn't reach melting temperatures, so can't smelt ore.

copper_sawBlock:0.Description: Saw with serrated edge. Great for cutting wood, but not very durable.

iron_sawBlock:0.Description: Saw with serrated edge. Great for cutting wood, but not very durable.

ClothingBlock:38.Description: Wooden armor reinforced with planks and rope. Provides decent protection. Slight warmth bonus.

ClothingBlock:39.Description: Wooden leg armor reinforced with planks and rope. Provides decent protection. Slight warmth bonus.
